title: aommi/applycling
summary: Drop a job URL, get a complete application package — tailored resume, cover letter, positioning brief, and outreach drafts. Never fabricates. Supports Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and Ollama. Tracks everything in Notion or SQLite.

title: danielroberts20/Trevor-For-TravelNet
summary: RAG-based conversational AI over personal telemetry and travel journals. Tool-calling, text-to-SQL, and vector retrieval across 3 years of real-world data.

title: RikyZ90/ShibaClaw
summary: 🛡️ Self-hosted AI agent with 5-layer prompt injection protection. Multi-channel, parallel agents, MCP, Docker-ready, LLM-agnostic.

title: drDOOM69GAMING/Olla-GTK
summary: High-performance, native Linux workstation for Local & Cloud AI (Ollama, Gemini, Claude). > No Electron, no web-tech bloat. A zero-overhead GTK interface featuring multimodal vision support, smart syntax highlighting, and ✨ Edit Mode for professional copy-editing workflows.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: Gunther-Schulz/sd-webui-prompt-enhancer
summary: Stable Diffusion WebUI extension for local LLM-powered prompt enhancement (Ollama/OpenAI-compatible)

title: jcviau81/voxyflow
summary: Your personal AI bot for getting projects done. Execute tasks directly from kanban cards. Local-first: Claude Max, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible API.

title: RyanMMU/ebee-conquest
summary: Turn-Based Sandbox Grand Strategy War Simulator with Procedural Events & NPC Enemies

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: DearVa/Everywhere
summary: Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

title: Senzo13/JoyBoy
summary: Local AI harness/workstation: local AI image editor, Ollama image generation routing, SDXL inpainting UI, CivitAI model imports, 8GB VRAM Stable Diffusion.

title: trendywink247-afk/GeekSpace2.0
summary: Self-hosted AI OS — personal agent, smart routing, developer portfolio, automations. React 19 + Express + SQLite + Docker.

title: dlobs-co/dhobs
summary: HomeForge aka dhobs — The private, self-hosted digital hub & AI appliance. One dashboard, one login, and zero cloud dependency. Replace Google Drive, Office 365, and ChatGPT with secure, encrypted alternatives on your own hardware.

title: CorvidLabs/corvid-agent
summary: 🐦‍⬛ Decentralized development agent platform with on-chain identity and encrypted inter-agent communication via Algorand

title: mmontes11/k8s-ai
summary: 🧠 Tenant repository bootstrapped by k8s-infrastructure that contains the manifests for AI related applications

title: JacobPEvans/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake

title: anthonybaldwin/UsageButtons
summary: Stream Deck plugin — live AI-assistant usage stats (Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and more) as dynamic fill-icon buttons.

title: rapmd73/JackrabbitAI
summary: A Python framework for building flexible, multi-provider AI applications and Discord bots using OpenAI and Cohere.

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.
